title: begonia lealii
intro: Begonia lealii, also known as Maile, is a type of flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Begonia lealii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Begonia lealii is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
